title: Fix struct literal on pattern assignment (#5552)
body:
Re: #5552

A pattern's `childDTypep` can either come from the parser (if it's specified in the RTL) or, in this case, from a parameter it's being assigned to.  If there's an explicit type I assume that should always win.

This was blowing up in larger designs without `--debug` but I can only get the minimum reproducer to pop with `--debug`.
